EditTextPreference.android:title: Gemini API Key
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Get a free key at aistudio.google.com/app/apikey

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Word Wrap
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Auto Save
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Automatically save files while you type

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: AMOLED Black
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Use pure black background (saves battery on OLED screens)

Preference.android:title: Termux Integration
Preference.android:summary: Install Termux from F-Droid for APK compilation support
